wordplay_note: A little pig who makes big trouble — the japer
card_description: Allen Purcell (meaning "Purcell = piglet (French)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man Who Japed*. Propaganda director who unconsciously vandalizes the statue of the regime's founder. Name note: A little pig who makes big trouble — the japer. The unconscious rebel — his true self acts while he sleeps. First appears in *The Man Who Japed*.

reference.brief: Propaganda director who unconsciously vandalizes the statue of the regime's founder
reference.significance: The unconscious rebel — his true self acts while he sleeps
